title: astragalus sprucei
intro: Astragalus sprucei, also known as the spruce milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body to resist stress and promote overall well-being. The medicinal properties of Astragalus sprucei include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fatigue, anxiety, and digestive issues. Astragalus sprucei can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to promote immune function and enhance overall health.
